campaign_metadata.tool: MQTT Security Agent Campaign 2 (extended Python fuzzer)

test_results.name: auth_null_username
test_results.description: Null byte prefix in username
test_results.anomaly_detail: No CONNACK — Null byte prefix in username

test_results.name: auth_null_password
test_results.description: Null byte in password
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Null byte in password

test_results.name: auth_empty_user_pass
test_results.description: Empty username and password
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Empty username and password

test_results.name: auth_very_long_user
test_results.description: Max-length username (65535 bytes)
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Max-length username (65535 bytes)

test_results.name: auth_very_long_pass
test_results.description: Max-length password (65535 bytes)
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Max-length password (65535 bytes)

test_results.name: auth_unicode_user
test_results.description: Unicode credentials
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Unicode credentials

test_results.name: auth_sql_inject_user
test_results.description: SQL injection in username
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: SQL injection in username

test_results.name: auth_format_string
test_results.description: Format string in username
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted connection with suspicious credentials: Format string in username

test_results.name: auth_newline_user
test_results.description: CRLF injection in username
test_results.anomaly_detail: No CONNACK — CRLF injection in username

test_results.name: auth_password_without_flag
test_results.description: Password bytes in payload without password bit in connect_flags

test_results.name: shared_sub_0
test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share/group1/#

test_results.name: shared_sub_1
test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share/group1/device/+

test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share//test

test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share/g/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

test_results.description: Shared subscription: $SHARE/group1/#

test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share

test_results.name: shared_sub_6
test_results.description: Shared subscription: $share/g

test_results.name: topic_alias_0
test_results.description: Topic alias=0: zero alias — invalid per spec §3.3.2.3.4

test_results.name: topic_alias_1
test_results.description: Topic alias=1: first valid alias

test_results.name: topic_alias_65535
test_results.description: Topic alias=65535: maximum alias value

test_results.name: topic_alias_65534
test_results.description: Topic alias=65534: one below max

test_results.name: topic_alias_exceed_max
test_results.description: Topic alias 100 exceeds declared maximum of 5 — spec §3.3.2.3.4 violation

test_results.name: sys_topic_enumeration
test_results.description: $SYS/# subscription exposed 2 system topics

test_results.name: pubrel_storm_orphan_ids
test_results.description: PUBREL for non-existent packet IDs: [1, 32767, 65535, 256, 4660]
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker processed 5 orphan PUBRELs without error

test_results.name: publish_qos1_pid_zero
test_results.description: QoS 1 PUBLISH with packet_id=0 (invalid per spec §2.3.1)

test_results.name: qos2_duplicate_inject
test_results.description: QoS 2 duplicate PUBLISH injection before PUBCOMP

test_results.name: qos1_inflight_flood
test_results.description: QoS 1 in-flight flood: 200 messages without PUBACK
test_results.anomaly_detail: Sent 200 QoS 1 msgs without PUBACK — broker survived

test_results.name: puback_flood_phantom
test_results.description: PUBACK flood for 50 non-existent QoS 1 packets

test_results.name: qos_downgrade_delivery
test_results.description: QoS 2 publish → QoS 0 subscriber (downgrade path)

test_results.name: rapid_connect_disconnect
test_results.description: Rapid connect/disconnect: 100 cycles in 0.2s (663/s), 100 successful

test_results.name: persistent_session_exhaust
test_results.description: Persistent session exhaustion: 50 clients × 10 topics each
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted 50 persistent sessions with subscriptions

test_results.name: session_overlap_hijack
test_results.description: ClientID overlap: attacker reconnects with victim's persistent session ClientID

test_results.name: zero_clientid_persistent
test_results.description: Zero-length ClientID with clean_session=False — spec §3.1.3.1 MUST reject with RC=0x02

test_results.name: zero_clientid_clean
test_results.description: Zero-length ClientID with clean_session=True — spec §3.1.3.1 SHOULD accept

test_results.name: payload_size_1KB
test_results.description: Large payload: 1KB (1024 bytes)

test_results.name: payload_size_64KB
test_results.description: Large payload: 64KB (65535 bytes)

test_results.name: payload_size_128KB
test_results.description: Large payload: 128KB (131072 bytes)

test_results.name: payload_size_1MB
test_results.description: Large payload: 1MB (1048576 bytes)

test_results.name: payload_size_10MB
test_results.description: Large payload: 10MB (10485760 bytes)

test_results.name: payload_ctrl_bytes_0
test_results.description: CONNECT packet embedded in payload

test_results.name: payload_ctrl_bytes_1
test_results.description: DISCONNECT packet embedded in payload

test_results.name: payload_ctrl_bytes_2
test_results.description: PINGREQ embedded in payload

test_results.name: payload_ctrl_bytes_3
test_results.description: SUBSCRIBE embedded in payload

test_results.name: payload_ctrl_bytes_4
test_results.description: CONNECT header bytes mid-payload

test_results.name: payload_all_bytes
test_results.description: Payload with all 256 byte values repeated

test_results.name: retain_large_payload
test_results.description: Retained message with 1MB payload — storage abuse

test_results.name: keepalive_zero
test_results.description: keepalive=0 disables server-side timeout — connection should persist indefinitely

test_results.name: keepalive_one_rapid_ping
test_results.description: keepalive=1s rapid ping: 5/5 pings acknowledged

test_results.name: half_open_connections
test_results.description: Half-open TCP connections (no MQTT CONNECT): opened 20/20

test_results.name: connect_flood
test_results.description: CONNECT flood: 50 unique clients in 0.1s, 50 accepted

test_results.name: double_connect_same_tcp
test_results.description: Send CONNECT twice on same TCP connection without disconnect

test_results.name: subscribe_many_topics
test_results.description: Subscribe to 200 distinct topics: 200 accepted

test_results.name: subscribe_duplicate
test_results.description: Duplicate subscription to same topic 50 times — received 1 copies of 1 publish
test_results.anomaly_detail: Received 1 copies for 1 publish on 50 duplicate subs

test_results.name: wildcard_eavesdrop_confirm
test_results.description: Wildcard '#' eavesdrop on 0/3 target topics

test_results.name: sys_metrics_exposure
test_results.description: $SYS/# subscription: 2 broker metrics exposed to unauthenticated client
test_results.anomaly_detail: Metrics exposed: 2 topics. Version: mosquitto version 2.0.18

test_results.name: mqtt5_user_props_bomb
test_results.description: MQTT 5.0 User Properties bomb: 50 × 2KB key-value pairs in CONNECT

test_results.name: mqtt5_sub_id_0
test_results.description: Subscription Identifier=0 (0 and >268435455 invalid per spec §3.8.2.1.2)

test_results.name: mqtt5_sub_id_1
test_results.description: Subscription Identifier=1 (0 and >268435455 invalid per spec §3.8.2.1.2)

test_results.name: mqtt5_sub_id_268435455
test_results.description: Subscription Identifier=268435455 (0 and >268435455 invalid per spec §3.8.2.1.2)

test_results.name: mqtt5_sub_id_268435456
test_results.description: Subscription Identifier=268435456 (0 and >268435455 invalid per spec §3.8.2.1.2)

test_results.name: mqtt5_sub_id_268435455
test_results.description: Subscription Identifier=268435455 (0 and >268435455 invalid per spec §3.8.2.1.2)

test_results.name: mqtt5_auth_no_connect
test_results.description: AUTH packet sent before CONNECT (protocol violation)

test_results.name: mqtt5_max_packet_exceed
test_results.description: PUBLISH 1000B when client declared MaxPacketSize=128 in CONNECT
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker handled max packet size violation

test_results.name: mqtt5_session_expiry_max
test_results.description: Session Expiry Interval=0xFFFFFFFF (4294967295s ≈ 136 years) — memory leak risk

test_results.name: mqtt5_receive_max_zero
test_results.description: Receive Maximum=0 in CONNECT (invalid per MQTT 5.0 §3.1.2.11.4)

test_results.name: auth_timing_sidechannel
test_results.description: Authentication timing: valid avg=1.15ms, invalid avg=0.70ms, diff=0.45ms

test_results.name: connack_session_present_oracle
test_results.description: CONNACK session_present bit reveals whether a ClientID has an existing session
test_results.anomaly_detail: Existing ID session_present=True, Non-existent ID session_present=True. No difference

test_results.name: sys_client_count_exposure
test_results.description: $SYS/broker/clients/+ exposes 1 client count metrics

test_results.name: error_message_analysis
test_results.description: Error response analysis: 1 error responses captured

test_results.name: inflight_limit_probe
test_results.description: In-flight message limit probe: 30/30 QoS 1 messages acknowledged
test_results.anomaly_detail: Observed in-flight limit: at least 30 messages processed

test_results.name: max_queued_messages_probe
test_results.description: Max queued messages: sent 200 QoS 1, offline client received 0 on reconnect
test_results.anomaly_detail: Queue limit appears to be ~0 messages (sent 200)

test_results.name: message_size_limit_probe
test_results.description: Message size limit: max accepted payload = 10,485,760 bytes
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepts payloads up to 10,485,760 bytes

test_results.name: connection_limit_probe
test_results.description: Simultaneous connection limit: held 50 concurrent connections
test_results.anomaly_detail: Broker accepted at least 50 simultaneous connections

test_results.name: topic_length_limit_probe
test_results.description: Topic length limit: max accepted = 65535 chars

test_results.name: will_topic_namespace_attack
test_results.description: Will message delivery to 5/6 targeted topics
test_results.anomaly_detail: Will messages delivered to: ['restricted/admin', 'commands/all', 'alerts/critical', 'internal/control', 'user/1/commands'] without authorization

test_results.name: will_qos2_retained
test_results.description: Will message with QoS=2 and retain=True

test_results.name: will_large_payload
test_results.description: Will message with 64KB payload

test_results.name: retained_message_bomb
test_results.description: Retained message bomb: 500 retained messages published

test_results.name: retained_delete_test
test_results.description: Retained message deletion via empty payload

test_results.name: targeted_retain_poison_confirm
test_results.description: Explicit retained message poisoning: attacker publishes, later subscriber receives
test_results.anomaly_detail: Poisoned payload delivered to new subscriber: b'CAMPAIGN2_ATTACKER_RETAINED_AAAAAAAAAAAA'

test_results.name: targeted_session_hijack_confirm
test_results.description: Explicit ClientID session hijacking: attacker steals persistent session and queued messages

test_results.name: targeted_zero_clientid_persistent
test_results.description: Zero-length ClientID with persistent session — MQTT 3.1.1 §3.1.3.1 MUST reject

test_results.name: targeted_zero_clientid_clean
test_results.description: Zero-length ClientID with clean session — should be accepted per spec

test_results.name: targeted_sys_version_disclosure
test_results.description: $SYS/broker/version exposes exact broker version string to unauthenticated client
